programme.title: NFL Game of the Week
programme.desc: Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams connected with rookie tight end Colston Loveland for a 58-yard touchdown with 17 seconds left to give the Bears a 47-42 victory on Sunday in a wild game that featured three touchdowns in the last two minutes.

programme.title: Golf Channel Games
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the influencer group Golf Girl Games, for competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan reveals her important pre-shot pointers; shares a drill for better balance and teaches how to build a repeatable swing like Scottie Scheffler.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Coach Nathalie Sheehan combines the lessons learned from golf's best coaches with her own approach to the game.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Coach Nathalie Sheehan combines the lessons learned from golf's best coaches with her own approach to the game.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Nathalie demonstrates how to eliminate slicing with a draw path drill and shares a tip for hitting powerful fades.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Coach Nathalie Sheehan combines the lessons learned from golf's best coaches with her own approach to the game.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Coach Nathalie Sheehan combines the lessons learned from golf's best coaches with her own approach to the game.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in the U.S. Open. Jack Nicklaus joins for an exclusive interview and shares the ball striking skill that helped him become a 4-time U.S. Open champion.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: A special edition episode from the 2020 U.S. Open from Winged Foot -- with more tips and tricks on how to improve your game.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Multiple-time tour winner Bryson DeChambeau and his coach Chris Como give an inside look of a training session focusing on swing mechanics, the science of golf, and more.

programme.title: 9 Shots With Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy covers hitting the nine key shots in golf from different positions on the course needed to shoot lower scores and impress friends.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: Putting technique and strategy lends itself to personal preference more than any other aspect of the game.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to save strokes by thinking around the course; they'll demonstrate how to take advantage of both sides of the tee-box and the importance of a good pre-shot routine.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como travels to Texas and learns the course management strategies Scott Fawcett teaches through a combination of shot distribution patterns and PGA scoring stats. Learn where to aim off the tee and which type of shot to play out of trouble.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: A 12-year-old rising star Ayden Febres and the bond he shares with his father Eli on and off the golf course; Ayden has goals to play on the PGA Tour and his parents are willing to sacrifice whatever it takes to make that a reality.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: Haven Ward's raw athletic talent is off the charts, and she's determined to play golf at the highest level; the high school senior's uphill battle to make that dream a reality wouldn't be possible without the sacrifices made by her mother, Shellie.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: Love, loss and life may best describe the Andrade family's journey through the game of golf; from how her mom and dad met to the unexpected loss of her first coach; Daniela Andrade is looking to the game of golf to turn tragedy into triumph.

programme.title: Home Course Advantage
programme.desc: After enduring seven rounds of high dose chemotherapy at age 9, Liam Eyer bravely faced and beat cancer; now, in his freshman year of high school in San Jose, Liam aims to play golf in college and become a pediatric oncologist.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: In the season premiere, host Devan Bonebrake teaches how surfing, Adam Scott and a medicine ball can improve a swing path for better ball-striking.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake analyzes the swings of Bryson DeChambeau and long drive champions to find the secret to distance off the tee. Learn creative drills for making a bigger backswing turn, using ground forces, and creating more clubhead speed.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how to play the key shots faced on the final 3 holes at TPC Sawgrass with setup and swing tips for long irons, wedges, and pressure-packed tee shots.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake reveals the three major reasons people hit slices and teaches the cure for each; learn how to hit draws on command like Rory McIlroy, sequence a swing like Fred Couples and use a cell phone as an anti-slice training aid.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches pitching and putting tips to help scramble to more pars and lower scores; learn short game drills used by Tiger Woods, Seve Ballesteros and Jon Rahm.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake uses the best players in the world to answer questions; learning how to fix alignment like Jack Nicklaus; swinging with better weight shift like Jon Rahm; improving through impact like Justin Thomas.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Randall Hunt takes new client Roger Bassin through a 90-day program of unique exercises, high-tech analysis and swing instruction to alleviate neck issues.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Lower back pain is an issue that plagues many golfers, and Randall Hunt is on a mission to eliminate that physical limitation.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Randall Hunt takes David Shimp through a 90-day program of unique exercises, high-tech analysis and swing instruction to alleviate back issues.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Brianna Asman as they learn how to increase range of motion, add distance and play pain-free golf through a 90-day program of swing instruction.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Matt Avril learn how to increase mobility and turn his slice into a powerful draw.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.desc: Dallas Stars center Tyler Seguin shares different shots that he uses on the ice, specifically the slap shot.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.sub-title: Golf vs. Pole Vaulting -- Mando Duplantis
programme.desc: From the differences in sports training to the similarities, join Chris Como as he meets some of the world's best athletes to learn how they prepare and how their skills might translate to the golf course.
